# MLTCENTERS Workshop
> MLTCENTERS is a modern language training center in Samut Prakan, Thailand. We run AI-powered English workshops, hands-on language activities, study-travel programs abroad, and interactive learning games for students and professionals.

Important notes:
- Website languages: Thai (primary) and English
- Online registration and contact forms are available
- Interactive tools: English AI conversation practice and a 3D English runner game for kids

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.mltcenters.com/): Workshop overview, benefits, gallery preview, FAQ, and registration call-to-action
- [About](https://www.mltcenters.com/about): Mission, teaching philosophy, and team background
- [Activities](https://www.mltcenters.com/activities): AI conversation, language apps, team games, digital presentations, and 3D runner game
- [Schedule](https://www.mltcenters.com/schedule): Study-travel dates (Singapore, Malaysia, Korea) and hotel workshop courses
- [Gallery](https://www.mltcenters.com/gallery): Photos from workshops and study-travel programs
- [Register](https://www.mltcenters.com/register): Online registration form for workshops and programs
- [Contact](https://www.mltcenters.com/contact): Phone, email, LINE QR code, and address

## Interactive tools
- [English AI Chat](https://www.mltcenters.com/assessment): Practice English conversation with AI in realistic scenarios
- [3D English Runner Game](https://www.mltcenters.com/runner-app/): Kids answer English questions while running in a 3D game

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://www.mltcenters.com/sitemap.xml): Indexable pages on this site
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/mltcenterbykrumam/): Workshop updates and announcements
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Krumamclub): Video content from MLTCENTERS
